scripts.start: concurrently -n tts,vite -c blue,green "node --env-file=server/.env --watch server/index.js" "npm --prefix apps/web run start"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n tts,vite -c blue,green "node --env-file=server/.env --watch server/index.js" "npm --prefix apps/web run dev"
scripts.ios:dev: concurrently -n python,tts,expo -c magenta,blue,yellow ".venv/bin/python src/python/tts_server.py" "node --env-file=server/.env --watch server/index.js" "npm --prefix apps/ios run start"
scripts.expo: cd apps/ios && eas build --platform ios --profile production && eas submit --platform ios --latest
